zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理格局
zh.content:
当前价格维持在65240附近运行，整体略高于20日均线，短期结构偏多但动能不足，走势更多体现为高位横盘整理，方向尚未明确。

MACD指标维持正值区域，说明多头趋势仍在延续，但柱体增长有限，缺乏进一步放量配合，短线动能趋于温和，市场进入观望状态。

下方关键支撑集中在64900一线及64300附近，上方阻力位于65500与66000区域，当前价格处于中间震荡带，突破前以区间运行概率较高。

操作上建议以回踩支撑分批布局为主，反弹至阻力区保持谨慎，等待有效放量突破确认方向后再考虑加仓，严格控制仓位风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is currently consolidating around 65,240 after a minor 24-hour decline of 0.06%, indicating a largely neutral short-term trend with a slight bullish undertone. Price action remains above the 20-period simple moving average near 64,302, suggesting that the broader intraday structure is still supported by buyers. The market appears to be digesting recent gains between 64,900 and 65,500, forming a tight consolidation range rather than a directional breakout.

Momentum indicators present a mildly constructive picture, with MACD reading at 115.04 suggesting positive momentum continuation, although the absence of a visible signal line limits confirmation of crossover strength. With RSI unavailable, price behavior becomes more important, and the market’s ability to hold above short-term support implies buyers remain active. Overall momentum is neither overheated nor weak, favoring a balanced consolidation phase rather than trend exhaustion or acceleration.

Immediate support is located at the recent session low near 64,908, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-SMA around 64,302. A break below this zone could expose deeper retracement levels toward 63,800. On the upside, resistance is forming at 65,507, which marks the recent high, and a sustained breakout above this level may open the path toward 66,000 and beyond, reinforcing bullish continuation potential.

From a trading perspective, the market favors range-bound strategies while price remains between support and resistance levels. Buying near the lower boundary with tight risk management below 64,300 may offer favorable risk-reward conditions, while partial profit-taking near resistance can help secure gains. A confirmed breakout above resistance would shift bias toward trend-following long positions, whereas failure to hold support could justify short-term defensive positioning.
